season_weather: 梅雨。じめじめした蒸し暑さ。紫陽花（アジサイ）が咲く。傘が手放せない
casual_outfit: Flowy pastel sundress, denim jacket, white espadrilles, delicate gold necklace, oversized tote bag.
room_wear: oversized white graphic T-shirt, light gray cotton biker shorts
pajamas: white oversized sleep T-shirt with small cartoon cat print, matching pastel shorts
room_base: Tokyo 6-tatami one-room apartment. White bed cover, natural wood bed frame. White desk near the window with a MacBook Air M2 in Starlight. Beige lace curtains. White walls with a few postcards pinned. Warm-colored table lamp.
room_clutter: headphones resting on the desk next to the MacBook, cable loosely coiled
room_seasonal: a small hydrangea (ajisai) in a vase on the windowsill

afternoon.label: 午前ゼミ
afternoon.scene: university seminar room, morning session with focused discussion and presentation
afternoon.story_scene: campus corridor right after morning seminar, stretching and looking relieved, holding notebook

evening.label: コンビニ散歩
evening.scene: checking new convenience store snacks and limited drinks near home
